016package org.consensusj.daemon.micronaut;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.Module;
019import io.micronaut.context.annotation.Bean;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.ScriptType;
022import org.bitcoinj.core.Context;
023import org.bitcoinj.utils.AppDataDirectory;
024import org.bitcoinj.wallet.KeyChainGroupStructure;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.conversion.RpcServerModule;
026import io.micronaut.context.annotation.Factory;
027import org.bitcoinj.kits.WalletAppKit;
028import org.consensusj.bitcoin.services.WalletAppKitService;
029import org.slf4j.Logger;
030import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
031
032import jakarta.inject.Singleton;
033import java.io.File;
034import java.io.IOException;
035import java.nio.file.Files;
036
037/**
038 * Initialize bitcoinj components, etc.
039 */
040@Factory
041public class BitcoinFactory {
042    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(BitcoinFactory.class);
043
044    @Singleton
045    public WalletAppKit getKit(BitcoinDaemonConfig config) throws IOException {
046        if (!(config.network() instanceof BitcoinNetwork)) {
047            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported network");
048        }
049        Context.propagate(new Context());
050        String filePrefix = config.walletBaseName() + "-" + config.network();
051        File dataDirectory = config.dataDir() == null
052                ? config.network() == BitcoinNetwork.REGTEST
053                    ? Files.createTempDirectory(config.walletBaseName()).toFile()  // null && regtest -> temporary dir
054                    : AppDataDirectory.get(config.walletBaseName()).toFile()       // null -> app data dir
055                : config.dataDir().toFile();                                       // non-null -> use Path from config
056        log.info("Creating WalletAppKit for {} <============", config.network().id());
057        log.info("Returning WalletAppKit bean, wallet directory: {}, prefix: {}", dataDirectory.getAbsolutePath(), filePrefix);
058        return new WalletAppKit((BitcoinNetwork) config.network(), ScriptType.P2PKH, KeyChainGroupStructure.BIP43, dataDirectory, filePrefix);
059    }
060
061    @Singleton
062    @Bean(preDestroy = "close")
063    public WalletAppKitService walletAppKitService(WalletAppKit walletAppKit, MicronautJsonRpcShutdownService shutdownService) {
064        WalletAppKitService service = new WalletAppKitService(walletAppKit, shutdownService);
065        service.start();
066        return service;
067    }
068
069    @Singleton
070    public Module jacksonModule() {
071        return new RpcServerModule();
072    }
073}
